title: Time to give Flex Stock a Go
text: Electronics manufacturing services company Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX) stock has fended off much of the market correction in 2022.

title: 3 Electronics Stocks to Watch From a Challenging Industry
text: Electronics stocks KLA (KLAC), Garmin (GRMN) and Flex (FLEX) are likely to benefit from investments in infrastructure and expanded capacity despite the pandemic-induced supply chain headwinds.
